records.name: Clinic Ghost Run
records.summary: Extract a whistleblower surgeon from a corporate black clinic before her memory gets rewritten.

details.twist: the surgeon does not want to leave without her patient archive

records.name: Braindance Wake
records.summary: Recover a dead celebrity's final unedited braindance before the studio spins the story.

records.name: Flood Tunnel Relay
records.summary: Escort a mesh-network relay through gang-held drainage tunnels during a chemical storm.

details.twist: the relay contains identities of hidden refugees

records.name: Proxy Executive
records.summary: Impersonate a vanished executive at a live merger gala long enough to sabotage the deal.

details.twist: the executive arranged the disappearance personally

records.name: Shut Down The Prophet
records.summary: Destroy or corrupt a predictive policing model before a targeted neighborhood gets designated hostile.

details.twist: the model is frighteningly accurate because it uses future market bids

records.name: Ash Rail Hijack
records.summary: Board a freight maglev to steal a sealed prototype container before it reaches offshore buyers.

details.twist: the container houses a living intelligence

records.name: Quiet Riot Broadcast
records.summary: Protect a pirate broadcast team long enough to expose labor-crime footage across the city.

details.twist: someone on the crew already sold the transmitter location

records.name: Mercy Debt Collection
records.summary: Erase a neighborhood's predatory implant debt ledger from a lender's vault.

details.twist: wiping the debt triggers physical shutdown implants

records.name: The Skin Printer Job
records.summary: Steal a biotech printer that can fabricate custom tissue grafts before a cartel buyer claims it.

details.twist: the printer has recorded every face it rebuilt

records.name: Salted Idol Rescue
records.summary: Find an idol whose public meltdown was staged to hide an extraction by her own management syndicate.

details.twist: the idol wants revenge, not safety
